message:
style(core): silence wildcard_imports on pragma_maintenance super::*

connection/pragma_maintenance.rs is a child file split off from
the main connection.rs module specifically to keep the parent
file size manageable.  The split relies on `use super::*;` so the
child sees every type, helper, and trait the parent already
imported, instead of duplicating ~150 import lines that would
have to stay in sync by hand.

That intentional convenience trips clippy::wildcard_imports under
strict lint settings.  Add a single
`#[allow(clippy::wildcard_imports)]` above the `use super::*;`
line so the lint stays on for the rest of the workspace while
this specific child file documents the exception.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
